name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-14
title: check-opus-for-planning-agents.py PATTERN matches innocuous words like 'span' or 'planet'
description: scripts/enforcement/check-opus-for-planning-agents.py line 19 uses substring regex 'brainstorm|spec|plan|design|architect' which will match 'plan' inside 'planet', 'planning', 'replant', etc. Tighten to word-boundary regex e.g. r'\b(brainstorm|spec|plan|design|architect)' to avoid false positives.
